TH_SANAE-NSFW_CARD_ART.title: NSFW Card Art
TH_SANAE-NSFW_CARD_ART.hover.desc: When enabled, ILikeIt, SanaeMilk, and SanaeMilky use NSFW card art. All other cards keep their default portraits.
TH_SANAE-TWO_GOD_PROTECTION.title: Two Gods' Protection
TH_SANAE-TWO_GOD_PROTECTION.hover.desc: When enabled, Act 2 always features Suwako as the Ancient, and Act 3 always features Kanako as the Ancient.
